subtitle: Two key absences block critical data migrations; urgent Cority response needed
context: Marie Cooksey is absent 8-12 June, returning 13 June, blocking handover of H&S workstreams and DSE user data coordination; James Salas Guillen is absent from end of day 5 June through 18 June, blocking monitoring of the PeopleXD to Cardinus automated data upload and contractor account creation decisions. Sophie Levy from Cority has not received a response in 2 months and is requesting urgent update on scoping session status. The Telephony Replacement Project sent action items this morning requiring walkarounds to ensure operational telephony by an undefined August deadline. Michael O'Sullivan's P5 Task# 50958836 for Incident# 11681780 requires closure coordination via the Functional Analysis Work Planner. The most time-critical deadline is the OWL network maintenance on 11 June requiring confirmation of readiness. Open Sophie Levy's scoping session email first to provide immediate response on Cority engagement status.
